root.speaker: Bowl-Tender Veen
root.text:
Quietly, please. The bowl wants only one strike at a
time, and only with the rim of one's nail.

try.speaker: Bowl-Tender Veen
try.text:
*Veen guides your hand. The bowl rings a clear note,
high and watery. The sound hangs in the air longer than
you expect — then fades, and the room is louder for
having held it.*

quiet.speaker: Bowl-Tender Veen
quiet.text:
Because one struck bowl makes you listen for the next.
Two struck bowls makes you stop listening.

props.message:
Glass bowl, water-tuned.

Strike with the rim of one's nail.

Half-filled with still water. The bowl sits on a wooden
stand carved with a single sigil for *patience*.
